description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, finished in a glossy blue color. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a black notch at the top housing sensors and a front-facing camera, and minimal bezels. The back is smooth and reflective, displaying a prominent silver Apple logo in the center and the word 'iPhone' near the bottom. A single camera lens and flash are positioned in the top left corner of the back, slightly raised from the surface. The sides are thin and metallic, with subtle button placements visible along the edges. The overall design is minimalist and premium, typical of recent Apple iPhone models.
description: A sleek blue smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display, a single rear camera, and a silver Apple logo on the back.
description_view_0: The back view shows a glossy blue surface with a silver Apple logo centered and a single camera with flash in the top left corner.
description_view_1: The left edge view reveals the phone's slim profile and subtle button placements along the side.
description_view_2: The front view displays the large screen with a black notch at the top, digital clock, and lock screen icons.
description_view_3: The right edge view highlights the phone's thinness and a slight camera bump near the top.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the phone, visually prominent against the blue surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen shows a digital lock screen with the time '12:34', the date 'Wednesday, January 1', and two icons at the bottom for flashlight and camera access. The background is a gradient blue wallpaper.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens with an adjacent flash is located in the top left corner on the back of the phone, slightly raised from the surface.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are subtly visible along the left and right edges, likely for volume and power functions, but no buttons are present on the front or back surfaces.
